freeze_boundary: This manifest documents topology ownership. It does not authorize new public infrastructure, DNS changes, or boot-path changes.

canonical_consumers.role: backend topology report and fallback contract

rules: Runtime topology values must be changed in runtime_topology.json first.
Public verification must not silently hit localhost.
Local verification must not silently hit api.lyraos.org.
CORS declared browser origins must match the topology contract.
Browser verification artifacts must be written under tmp/.
future_s1c_checks: grep for hard-coded API origins outside runtime_topology consumers
fail if verifier defaults disagree with runtime_topology.json
fail if public boot scripts bypass the topology verifier
